rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROTENA SWEARINGEN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Determination
rulings.Rulings: Application for determination that the proposed Petition for Instructions does not violate the terms of the no contest clause of decedent's will or trigger a contest of decedent's trust is denied. The instrument containing the no contest clause is not before the Court. The Court cannot determine the effect of any provision of a will until the will is admitted to probate.
